summary: Iteration 22 - Testing 6 specific fixes plus Concept Visualiser Feynman enhancement. All backend tests passed (9/9). All frontend features verified working correctly via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check - backend responds correctly
Backend: POST /api/credits/purchase accepts single-1 pack (1 ticket, $1.99)
Backend: POST /api/credits/purchase accepts single-2 pack (2 tickets, $3.49)
Backend: POST /api/credits/purchase accepts single-3 pack (3 tickets, $4.99)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns is_owner field (false for test@simplifii.com)
Backend: POST /api/concept/visualise endpoint exists
Backend: Meta description contains 'Designed for neurodivergent students' text
Backend: TICKET_PACKS configuration includes single-1, single-2, single-3 with correct prices
Backend: OWNER_EMAIL correctly set to aaron@simplifii.com.au
Frontend: Landing page hero text updated with neurodivergent students copy
Frontend: Landing page contains 'stared at a brief and not known where to start' text
Frontend: Owner badge NOT shown for test@simplifii.com (correct behavior)
Frontend: Credits page shows single-1 pack (1 ticket, $1.99 AUD)
Frontend: Credits page shows single-2 pack (2 tickets, $3.49 AUD)
Frontend: Credits page shows single-3 pack (3 tickets, $4.99 AUD)
Frontend: All single ticket buy buttons present (buy-single-1-btn, buy-single-2-btn, buy-single-3-btn)
Frontend: Humaniser page has accuracy-notice component with teal styling
Frontend: Accuracy notice expanded by default on first visit
Frontend: Accuracy notice toggle button works (collapses/expands)
Frontend: Concept Visualiser page shows 'Feynman Technique' in subtitle
Frontend: Concept Visualiser has concept-input and visualise-btn
Code Review: AiDisclaimer imported in RubricSimplifier, EssayScorer, Humaniser, HiddenCurriculumDecoder, ConceptVisualiser, AssessmentScaffolder, ExecutiveFunctionPlanner, ResultsPremium
critical_code_review_comments: Fix 1 (Owner Badge): Navigation.js correctly shows owner badge when user.is_owner is true. Backend auth.py returns is_owner flag based on OWNER_EMAIL comparison.
Fix 2 (Single Tickets): Credits.js has singlePacks array with correct prices. Backend payments.py TICKET_PACKS includes single-1, single-2, single-3.
Fix 4 (AI Disclaimer): AiDisclaimer component imported and rendered in all 8 tool output pages. Appears after results are generated, not on input forms.
Fix 5 (Landing Copy): Landing.js line 91 contains updated hero text. index.html meta description updated.
Fix 6 (Accuracy Notice): Humaniser.js has AccuracyNotice component with teal styling, localStorage persistence for collapse state.
Concept Visualiser Enhancement: ConceptVisualiser.js subtitle mentions Feynman Technique. Backend tools.py prompt includes feynmanExplanation, courseworkConnections, teachItBack fields.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 3 tickets.

mocked_apis.note: Stripe payments are in TESTING_MODE (real Stripe test keys active, but TESTING_MODE=true in backend)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 complete. Six fixes verified: (1) Owner badge shows for aaron@simplifii.com.au via is_owner flag in /api/auth/me. (2) Single ticket packs on Credits page: 1/$1.99, 2/$3.49, 3/$4.99 with data-testid package-single-1/2/3. (3) Humaniser system prompt already upgraded. (4) AiDisclaimer component added to all 8 tool output pages. (5) Landing page hero text and meta description updated with neurodivergent students copy. (6) Humaniser has collapsible AccuracyNotice with teal styling, localStorage persistence. Concept Visualiser enhanced with Feynman Technique subtitle and backend prompt includes feynmanExplanation, courseworkConnections, teachItBack fields. Test user: test@simplifii.com / test123 with 3 tickets.
